image_source.selection_reason: README.md recommends openEuler 22.03 LTS-SP4 AArch64 → selected openEuler 24.03 LTS as closest available

architecture.source: README.md - 版本配套章节: '鲲鹏 920 专业版' + 'openEuler 22.03 (LTS-SP4) AArch64'

recommended_image.value: README 推荐 openEuler 22.03 LTS-SP4 → 选择 openEuler 24.03 LTS

value: KUPL 26.0.RC1 (README - Kunpeng Unified Performance Library via HPCKit)

execution_log.command: sh build.sh with CPATH=/usr/include/openmpi-x86_64 (attempt 3 - kupl.h not found)

execution_log.output: Build SUCCESS. libkuqcd.so.1. (1.3MB ELF x86-64 shared library)

execution_log.error: No test binary produced - Kunpeng-specific hardware check blocks x86_64

execution_log.command: docker stop ttfhw-kuqcd-env && docker rm ttfhw-kuqcd-env

process_timeline.action: Read README.md, CMakeLists.txt, build.sh, test scripts
process_timeline.result: Extracted dependencies: cmake >= 3.18, HPCKit (BiSheng/GCC + HMPI + KUPL), environment-modules. Target: openEuler AArch64

process_timeline.action: Start openEuler container with repo mounted at /workspace
Install cmake, gcc-c++, make, environment-modules via dnf
Install openmpi-devel as MPI provider (HMPI from HPCKit not available)
4 build attempts: missing mpi.h → missing kupl.h → missing arm_sve.h → SUCCESS with USE_KUPL=OFF USE_SVE=OFF
Manual test compilation (documented build.sh has Kunpeng 920 CPU guard)
Run test_solver with input grid configuration

build.note: Build succeeded after setting USE_KUPL=OFF and USE_SVE=OFF via cmake (no source code modified). These are documented cmake options in CMakeLists.txt lines 59-61.

ut.note: Test compiled manually bypassing test/build.sh Kunpeng 920 CPU check (CPU part == 0xd22 guard). Compiled with openmpi mpicxx instead of HMPI.

sample.note: test/test_solver serves as the sample program. It runs the Multishift CG solver on a 1x1x1x1 lattice grid.

results.name: test_solver
results.output:
start test kuqcd_solve_multishift
end test kuqcd_solve_multishift PASSED
1 tests ran, 1 tests PASSED, 0 tests FAILED

documentation_gaps.gap: 未提及x86_64编译路径: CMakeLists.txt（第161-162行）包含x86_64分支但README仅声明AArch64/鲲鹏920支持
KUPL依赖未标注为可选: CMakeLists.txt有USE_KUPL=OFF选项但README未说明可在无KUPL环境下编译
SVE依赖未标注为可选: CMakeLists.txt有USE_SVE=OFF选项但README未说明x86_64环境需关闭SVE
无替代MPI方案: README仅提及HMPI(Huawei MPI)但代码使用标准MPI调用,openmpi可用作替代
测试脚本CPU检查: test/build.sh硬编码Kunpeng920 CPU part检查(0xd22),阻止非鲲鹏平台测试
HPCKit版本号未提供默认值: CMakeLists.txt引用HPCKit_VERSION环境变量但build.sh不接受参数时未设置默认值
无独立样例/示例章节: README无Examples/Quick Start章节,仅有测试章节
未列出运行时MPI依赖: libkuqcd.so链接libmpi,但README未在运行依赖中明确列出

problems_encountered.problem: HPCKit不可用: 专有华为软件包,公开容器环境无法获取
problems_encountered.solution: 使用openEuler repos中的标准软件包替代: openmpi-devel替代HMPI, gcc-c++替代BiSheng
problems_encountered.source: README.md文档记录的依赖链 → 从dnf仓库安装公开可用的等价包

problems_encountered.problem: mpi.h未找到: openmpi-devel安装后头文件在/usr/include/openmpi-x86_64/非标准路径
problems_encountered.solution: 设置CPATH=/usr/include/openmpi-x86_64 (对应README中HMPI的export CPATH指令模式)
problems_encountered.source: README.md - HMPI环境变量设置章节 (第74-78行)

problems_encountered.problem: kupl.h未找到: KUPL(Kunpeng Unified Performance Library)是专有库
problems_encountered.solution: 使用cmake -DUSE_KUPL=OFF (CMakeLists.txt第61行定义的选项, 代码使用#ifdef USE_KUPL守卫)
problems_encountered.source: CMakeLists.txt line 61 (option USE_KUPL) + include/kuqcd_utils.h line 26 (#ifdef USE_KUPL)

problems_encountered.problem: arm_sve.h未找到 + #if SVEBITS == 512预处理错误: ARM SVE intrinsics在x86_64上不可用
test/build.sh跳过编译: 硬编码检查CPU part == 0xd22 (鲲鹏920) → x86_64环境测试无法按文档执行
problems_encountered.solution: 手动执行mpicxx编译命令绕过CPU检查 (test/build.sh中第8-13行的编译逻辑)

problems_encountered.problem: libkuqcd.so版本号异常: 输出libkuqcd.so.1. (末尾多余的点号)
problems_encountered.solution: CMakeLists.txt使用$ENV{HPCKit_VERSION}未设置时为空,导致VERSION 1. (末尾带点). 需设置HPCKit_VERSION环境变量
problems_encountered.source: src/CMakeLists.txt line 43: set_target_properties(kuqcd PROPERTIES VERSION 1.${HPCKit_VERSION} SOVERSION 1)
